jobs.title: Full stack Developer VUE JS

Siamo alla ricerca di un/una Senior Full Stack Developer qualificato/a, con esperienza nello sviluppo di applicazioni web moderne e scalabili. La figura sarà coinvolta in tutte le fasi del ciclo di vita del software, dalla progettazione all’implementazione, lavorando in un contesto agile e collaborativo. Progettare, sviluppare e mantenere applicazioni web full stack Collaborare con team cross-funzionali (UX/UI, DevOps, Product Owner) Contribuire alla definizione dell’architettura software Ottimizzare le performance e garantire la qualità delle applicazioni Supportare e guidare sviluppatori più junior Familiarità con metodologie Agile / sviluppo iterativo Ottima conoscenza di TypeScript js Esperienza con database PostgreSQL e scrittura di query SQL Front-end: Esperienza con TypeScript Ottima conoscenza di Vue.js 3 Inoltre, teniamo fede ai nostri impegni prestando attenzione alle risorse appartenenti alle categorie protette ai sensi degli articoli 1 e 18 della Legge 68/99. I dati personali saranno trattati in conformità alle disposizioni contenute nel regolamento UE 2016/679.

score.reason: Strong senior Vue 3 + TypeScript match with explicit mentoring responsibilities. Remote policy unclear—likely office-based in Latina. Backend framework unspecified in JD.

jobs.title: Senior Front-end Engineer - REMOTE - VUE.JS
jobs.rawDescription: YOUR ROLE We need someone like you to help create software solutions that help millions of users make informed decisions. If you’re looking to make an impact while leveraging groundbreaking technologies, this is the place for you. At Launch Potato you will be an integral member of the LP Tech Team where you will have the opportunity to lead our technical path and be empowered to drive our products. Our team has built groundbreaking technology that helps us understand our millions of users and helps them reach their personal goals every day across our portfolio of brands. On any given day you might be working on our proprietary platform creating solutions that improve the UIs we use to visualize and manage our data. Or you might be improving the user experience on one of our owned and operated sites by launching a new product. Whatever it may be, you will be making an impact! You will be working cross-functionally with passionate, extremely smart individuals with tons of opportunities for learning, growth, and mentorship. We are an extremely fun and tight-knit team (our company retreats are fabulous), so we are very selective about who we hire to ensure our company values remain high. As part of the LP Tech Team, will have access to the best tools to remove any blockers and enable your success. On a typical day you might: • Develop javascript component-based plugins • Write front end code for dashboards that allow non-technical users to intuitively interact with data • Collaborate with product managers, designers, stakeholders, anyone to help create the best product possible • Coach and mentor other engineers on best practices • Research new technologies and prototype potential solutions • Lead discussions about project architecture and technical feasibility • Build internal tools used to increase team productivity Our current tech stack: • Frontend languages and Libraries • HTML5/Javascript, • jQuery, Vue.js, React, Node.js, GraphQL • CSS Grid, flexbox, bootstrap, m

score.reason: Vue.js is titled and primary, with mentoring/lead signals that are a plus. However, the role expects broad multi-framework expertise (React equally prominent), lacks TypeScript entirely, and includes Python/Django backend—Alfonso's stack is tighter. Remote tag is positive but South Africa location needs clarification.
red_flags: South Africa location tag, needs confirmation

jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Developer (Kotlin, Vue.js) (Remote, Full-Time) [AS197]
jobs.rawDescription: Senior Full Stack Developer (Kotlin, Vue.js) (Remote, Full-Time) [AS197] About Smart Working At Smart Working, we believe your job should not only look right on paper but also feel right every day. From day one, youre welcomed into a genuine community that values your growth and well-being. Our mission is simple: to break down geographic barriers and connect skilled professionals with outstanding global teams and products for full-time, long-term roles. We help you discover meaningful work with teams that invest in your success, where youre empowered to grow personally and professionally.Join one of the highest-rated workplaces on Glassdoor and experience what it means to thrive in a truly remote-first world. score.reason: Vue.js is primary and matches your 3+ years requirement, but this is a genuine full-stack role requiring 3+ years of Kotlin backend work — a JVM language outside your skill matrix.

jobs.title: Senior Vue Js Developer - FULL REMOTE
jobs.rawDescription: Siamo una software house italiana attiva dal 1998, composta da un team di 25 professionisti. Progettiamo e sviluppiamo gestionali complessi web-based , rivolgendoci principalmente a casse edili e scuole edili su tutto il territorio nazionale. Lavoriamo con tecnologie moderne e architetture all'avanguardia, credendo in un approccio pragmatico, agile e collaborativo, dove ogni sviluppatore è protagonista del successo dei nostri progetti. Sarai il referente tecnico per le attività di DevOps o per la sicurezza del software. Hai almeno 5 anni di esperienza consolidata nello sviluppo software. Hai un'eccellente padronanza di C#, JavaScript framework (es. Angular, React, Vue.js) e MS SQL. Possiedi competenze solide in almeno una tra DevOps o Sicurezza Informatica. Sei analitico, autonomo nella gestione dei progetti e orientato alla qualità. Flessibilità organizzativa: possibilità di lavorare fino al 100% da remoto (previsti solo due incontri annuali per team building, a giugno e dicembre). Contratto a tempo indeterminato.

score.reason: Strong Vue match—the title explicitly says 'Senior Vue Js Developer'—and ideal for an Italian native speaker working fully remote from Spain (only 2 in-person meetings/year). However, the role demands 'excellent C# mastery' alongside DevOps or Security expertise. This is a full-stack position beyond Alfonso's backend depth (learning-level Node; C# is not in his skill matrix).

jobs.title: Front-end Developer Vue.js (Full remote)

Frontend / Full Stack Software Developer In Assist-x, quando realizziamo un prodotto, fra le nostre priorità c’è quella di sviluppare codice e infrastrutture all’avanguardia, allineate con i moderni stack tecnologici e seguendo le best practice di sviluppo per garantire manutenibilità e scalabilità del software nel lungo periodo. Cerchiamo un Frontend Software Developer capace di contribuire allo sviluppo di soluzioni software di alta qualità. La figura lavorerà in sinergia con i team di product design, UX/UI e Backend per tradurre i requisiti in soluzioni affidabili e scalabili. Siamo aperti a profili mid ma anche junior purché ragionevolmente autonomi. Descrizione dell’azienda Assist-x è una giovane realtà tech specializzata nell’offrire soluzioni software, AI e infrastruttura cloud ad aziende che necessitano di innovare il proprio business o sviluppare prodotti da lanciare sul mercato. Sviluppo, implementazione e manutenzione di interfacce web e mobile utilizzando React e React Native. Gestione avanzata dello stato dell’applicazione (Zustand, Context API) Integrazione con le API RESTful o GraphQL fornite dal backend. Collaborazione costante con UI/UX designer e sviluppatori backend per garantire un’integrazione fluida e la migliore esperienza utente (UX) possibile. Ottima padronanza di JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript e npm. Comprovata esperienza nello sviluppo di componenti riutilizzabili con React e React Native. Solida base nei linguaggi web fondamentali (HTML5, CSS3/SASS, architettura del DOM) e approccio Mobile First / Responsive Design. Conoscenza dei principi fondanti del Software Engineering (Clean Code, design pattern). Gradita conoscenza del framework Vue.js. js per interfacciarsi meglio con il team backend. Familiarità con Docker, containeri

score.reason: React and React Native are primary; Vue.js is explicitly 'nice-to-have' (violates F1). Job targets mid/junior profiles, below Alfonso's senior+ requirement. Italian role (native language + fully remote) is a structural fit, but stack priority and seniority mismatch are disqualifying.

jobs.title: Full-stack Developer - Tieto Tech Consulting (m/f/d)
jobs.rawDescription: Job Description Tule mukaan Tieto Tech Consulting -tiimiin ja kasva osaajana myös roolisi ulkopuolella! Meillä pääset työskentelemään monipuolisissa ja yhteiskunnallisesti merkityksellisissä projekteissa, joissa jokaisen näkökulmalla ja osaamisella on arvoa. Tässä tehtävässä pääset vaikuttamaan tulevaisuuden digitaalista arkea osana asiantuntevaa, kannustavaa ja monimuotoista yhteisöä, jossa oppimista ja yhdessä onnistumista tuetaan. Mikä on Tech Consulting? Tech Consulting on digitaalisen suunnittelun ja ohjelmistokehityksen yksikkö, jossa autamme asiakkaitamme kasvamaan yhdistämällä liiketoimintamuotoilun, teknologisen osaamisen ja modernin ohjelmistokehityksen. Uskomme yhteistyöhön, avoimuuteen ja siihen, että parhaat ratkaisut syntyvät erilaisten ihmisten ja ajatusten kohdatessa. Asiakkainamme on yli 130 organisaatiota eri toimialoilta - kuten julkishallinto, finanssi, eläke, energia, logistiikka ja valmistava teollisuus. Kehitämme arjen digitaalisia palveluita, joita todennäköisesti käytät itsekin - ja joilla on todellista vaikutusta ihmisten arkeen ja yhteiskuntaan. Mitä tulet tekemään? Etsimme nyt Full Stack -kehittäjää, joilla on työkokemusta seuraavista teknologioista: React (vähintään 3 vuotta) Node.js tai Java (vähintään 3 vuotta) TypeScript (vähintään 3 vuotta) Pilviteknologiat, kuten Azure, AWS, Google Cloud tai OpenShift CSS ja jokin tyylikirjasto, kuten Tailwind CSS Kokemus tekoälyavusteisesta ohjelmistokehityksestä Kokemus ketteristä toimintatavoista Mitä odotamme sinulta? Sujuvaa suomen ja englannin kielen taitoa Lisäksi uskomme, että viihdyt ja menestyt tehtävässä erityisen hyvin, jos sinulla on myös: Kokemusta JS-frameworkeista, kuten Next.js, Gatsby, Remix, Angular, Svelte tai Vue Saavutettavuusvaatimusten tuntemusta ja kokemusta aiheeseen liittyvistä projekteista Taustaa headless CMS -ratkaisuista Osaamista mobiilisovelluskehityksessä (React Native tai Flutter) DevOps-käytäntöjen tuntemusta Kokemusta testiautomaatiotyökaluista (esim. Playwright

AI-assisted development is explicitly required (+20), but the core backend stack (Node.js or Java at 3+ years) mismatches Alfonso's basic Node knowledge and non-existent Java experience. This role requires strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work across all aspects of a multi-tiered architecture. The ideal candidate is self-motivated, detail-oriented, adaptable, customer-focused, and eager to mentor team members. They identify areas for improvement and act on them. You will collaborate with engineers, managers, product management, and operations to deliver solutions that meet customer, business, and technical requirements. While Claude Code is explicitly valued, this role requires deep expertise in Python/Django, which is outside Alfonso's experience.
